calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire; CRS: Beldon Yee, Bailiff: Louise Perotti, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Petitioners: Igor Levit and Victoria Levit parents of minor Andrew Levitskiy, in pro per were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name of minor to Andrew Levit.
Decree signed in open court.
